{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118165847B2189DB469FC93A61A"}"},"total":2935},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7256582296999969597","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"[哭]文笔好到不像是番茄的文 太牛了 古今思想的碰撞 并没有像以往的穿越文那样高高在上的俯视这个时代 而是从古人的角度道出了现代社会的一些弊病 丝毫没有穿越者的傲慢 好喜欢主角三人和他们的古代好朋友们哦～而且文笔也挺诙谐的 一点都不会觉得在讲大道理"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689554853,"group_id":"7209294458800573492","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"土里刨食","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3wWSEqqdsfWmXCly6c8a8Y=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1fadf9685a37417b90afe41d94df04d0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616661&x-signature=BGXFxpmxI8RYlo%2FHnTkdcxWCe%2B0%3D","user_id":"286352196765448","user_name":"给我康康种田文"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"286352196765448","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":129,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7209294458800573492","book_info":{"abstract":"【群像+群穿+种田经商+从军行医+自立自强，励志爽文，慢热，日常流水账】
一场车祸让三个女人意外穿越至陌生的大吴朝，开局掉进土匪窝。
祝明月：看我带着两个拖油瓶如何富可敌国；
段晓棠：看我领着两个队友如何安定四方；
林婉婉：看我抱着两条金大腿如何躺平人生…偶尔也可以翻身客串神医，大展身手。
全然陌生的环境，危机四伏的现实。胜利会师的第一天一致决定——抱团取暖，不搞事不闹事，争取苟到最后。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1b3274eab25986be90eff0fe3e08b4d6","author":"一灯阑珊","author_id":"","book_id":"7209294458800573492","book_name":"谢邀，人在长安，正准备造反","book_short_name":"谢邀人在长安","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#5898b0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":247,"name":"医术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=247&name=医术&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":388,"name":"女扮男装","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=388&name=女扮男装&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7209296930038350393","read_count":"32676","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"5044044"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"2459","tags":"种田,医术,古代言情,穿越,女扮男装,今穿古","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/31d219656d6147905a5ce2b8672989dd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779272218&x-signature=27AMdXMzS5%2BLiby5wVdsbtm8%2B4A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3760767119408909","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.1820047e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032118165847B2189DB469FC93A61A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读12小时后点
